# Campbell Digital Studio — Client Site Templates

Repeatable starting configurations for each site type. Each template documents every variable that changes between clients so a new build can be initialized, configured, and launched without reinventing the architecture.

## Template Library

| Template | Based On | Stack | Typical Page Count |
|---|---|---|---|
| [HVAC / Local Service](#) | ACExperts251 | Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind, API Routes | 25–35 pages |
| [Medical Wellness / Medspa](#) | Revitalize Aesthetics & Wellness | Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind | 40–60 pages |
| [Therapy / Counseling Practice](#) | Collective Counseling | HTML/CSS, Multi-page | 4–8 pages |
| [Barbershop / Appointment Business](#) | Blessed Barbershop | HTML/CSS, Mobile-first | 1–4 pages |

---

## How to Use These Templates

1. **Read the template spec** for the appropriate site type
2. **Collect client config** — use the CLIENT CONFIG section of the spec as a client intake checklist
3. **Copy the base project** — duplicate the source project folder, strip client-specific content
4. **Replace all config values** — update the site config file with new client values
5. **Swap content and media** — replace copy, images, service names, and branding
6. **Run the launch checklist** — every template includes a pre-launch QA list

---

## Template Files

- `template-hvac-local-service.md` — HVAC and local trade/service businesses
- `template-medical-wellness-medspa.md` — Medspas, wellness clinics, hormone practices, aesthetics
- `template-therapy-counseling.md` — Therapy practices, counselors, psychologists, ADHD/testing specialists
- `template-barbershop-appointment.md` — Barbershops, salons, and single-location appointment businesses
